hooks.command: git diff HEAD -- src/ --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && claude -p "src/ files have changed since the last commit. Run 'git diff HEAD -- src/' to see what changed, then update CLAUDE.md if the file structure, types, or key behaviors changed. Be minimal — only touch sections that actually need updating." --allowedTools Edit,Read,Bash 2>/dev/null || true
